records.title: BioPrint-LKM: An evidence-grounded large knowledge model for bioprinting knowledge retrieval and parameter initialization
records.tldr: BioPrint-LKM uses literature-guided parameter suggestions to reduce trial-and-error and shorten the number of experiments needed for bioprinting calibration.

records.title: DPA4: A Generalist Foundation Model for the Era of On-Demand Interatomic Potentials
records.tldr: DPA4 sets a new accuracy-efficiency frontier for equivariant interatomic potentials, achieving state-of-the-art results on materials and molecular benchmarks with native short-range physics and compiled conservative-force training.

records.title: A Fairness Audit of Medical Imaging Foundation Models on a Multimodal Structured Clinical Benchmark
records.tldr: Foundation models for medical imaging miss critical localized signals, leading to worse PE diagnosis and large age-driven fairness gaps that only high capacity models can effectively mitigate.

records.title: Accelerating Electrolyte Discovery via a Closed-Loop Physical AI Platform
LLM-Guided High-Throughput Discovery of Antifreeze Electrolytes Enabling −50 °C Stability and 99.5% Coulombic Efficiency
records.tldr: Low cost platform for AI4Mat research

records.title: AI-Assisted Reaction Network and Catalyst Exploration for CO₂ Conversion
Motif-driven scalable design of rutile multi-cation rutile oxides for oxygen evolution reaction
records.tldr: A generalizable, interpretable paradigm for scalable catalyst design, overcoming the limitations of explicit first-principles calculations.

records.title: A Hybrid Physics-Driven Neural Network Force Field for Liquid Electrolytes
records.tldr: A hybrid physics/ML force field for battery electrolytes trains only on monomer and dimer data, yet generalizes to bulk-phase property prediction with state-of-the-art accuracy and broad chemical space coverage.

records.title: Reinforcement Learning-Enabled Control of Single DNA Molecule Manipulation in Microfluidics
records.tldr: Using Reinforcement Learning enables the successful execution of targeted bending task that was previously inaccessible, demonstrating a significant leap in the flexibility and intelligence of molecular manipulation.

records.title: MolViBench: Evaluating LLMs on Molecular Vibe Coding
Risk-averse optimization of genetic circuits under uncertainty
records.tldr: We develop a risk-averse optimization approach for genetic circuit design; the method can leverage data from previous designs, including failures, to recommend new robust designs.

records.title: Building a Decision-Driven Materials Discovery Institute: Early Insights from MDRI
records.tldr: MDRI accelerates materials innovation into real-world applications through automated workflows, integrated analytics, and early safety evaluations.

records.title: The Geometry of Reasoning Failure: Predicting Agent Errors from Semantic Scale Trajectories
records.tldr: We detect when an LLM’s scientific reasoning hits a scale boundary by monitoring geometric breakdowns in its hidden-state trajectory, enabling timely, automatic shifts in abstraction before it gets stuck in local loops.

records.title: Directing Open-Ended Evolution in Artificial Life via Temporal Multi-Scale Structural Complexity
records.tldr: T-MSSC is an interpretable fitness for Flow-Lenia open-ended evolution: it measures how tracer-particle motion differs across timescales. Optimizing it yields rich multi-species ecologies and reveals scale separation

records.title: Recent Progress in AI-Driven 3D (Bio)Printing for Tissue Engineering
records.tldr: This study provides an overall picture of the use of artificial intelligence models in all stages of 3D (bio)printing for tissue engineering.

records.title: SynTwins: A Retrosynthesis-Guided Framework for Synthesizable Molecular Analog Generation
records.tldr: A training-free, retrosynthesis-guided framework for generating synthetically accessible molecular analogs that outperforms ML methods and instantly adapts to new chemistry for self-driving lab integration.

records.title: Impact of Disruptive Technologies on Value Creation and Capture: Comparing OTT and LLMs providers
records.tldr: Comparing  the Telecom business models under competition with OTT companies and LLMs vendors attempts to monetize their assets

records.title: How Prompt Structural Framing and Cognitive Scaffolding Influence Performance in Generative AI Design?
A Framework for Bayesian Optimization in Mixture Spaces
records.tldr: We propose a constraint taxonomy for informing constraint-based BO algorithms in the mixture formulation space, by formalizing mixture design as compositional accords under practical and chemical constraints.

records.title: Multiscale modeling of resistive switching in two-dimensional heterostructures
Inferring Oocyte Cytoplasmic Material Properties from Cytoplasmic Streaming Movies Using Physics-Informed Neural Networks
records.tldr: A physics-informed neural network infers cytoplasmic viscosity from oocyte streaming movies, yielding estimates consistent with bead-based microrheology and reliably capturing sample-to-sample variation across multiple oocytes and initializations.

records.title: Transferable Impedance-Grounded Learning for Interfacial Degradation Across Energy Systems
records.tldr: We develop a physics-grounded transfer learning framework using electrochemical impedance spectroscopy to predict interfacial degradation across perovskite solar cells and lithium-ion batteries.

records.title: AI-Guided Optimization of EIS Measurements: Minimizing Low-Frequency Sampling for Data-Efficient Electrochemical Characterization
records.tldr: We present a physics-informed Bayesian framework that reconstructs full EIS spectra by augmenting high-frequency data, effectively reducing the need for noisy low-frequency measurements while maintaining model fidelity

records.title: NIMO Controller: An accessible self-driving laboratory orchestrator based on the model context protocol
records.tldr: We developed an MCP-based controller for self-driving laboratories with visual programming and natural language interfaces.

records.title: 3D Microstructure Reconstruction of X70 Pipeline Steel from 2D EBSD Data Using SliceGAN
records.tldr: We investigate the use of SliceGAN to reconstruct 3D EBSD microstructures of X70 pipeline steel from 2D slices, experimenting with various orientation representations and network architectures, including quaternion neural networks.

records.title: VLM4Physics: Equation Discovery Using Multi-modal Inputs
records.tldr: The paper introduces a multimodal equation discovery framework which incorporates VLM-based reasoning, informed coefficient initialization, and contextual priors.

records.title: Toward TheraAgent: Evidence-Grounded, Self-Verifying AI for Oncology Treatment Recommendation
records.tldr: TheraAgent proposes an oncology copilot that abstracts patient state, retrieves evidence in steps, drafts ranked options, and independently verifies each claim so unsupported recommendations become abstentions before clinician review.

records.title: Evolving Robust Drug Candidates via Co-Evolutionary Artificial Life Simulators
records.tldr: Drug design is recast as Red Queen-style co-evolution: evolving compounds and mutating protein targets adapt against each other in simulation, allowing a fast GNN fitness model to identify scaffolds that remain effective as resistance emerges.

records.title: Latent World Models of Cell Painting Data for In Silico Phenotypic Screening
records.tldr: A latent world model for Cell Painting predicts how compounds shift cellular morphology, denoises noisy image-level variation, classifies phenotypes on unseen compounds, and points toward ultrafast, low-cost in silico phenotypic screening.

records.title: PD-NCA AutoLab: Self-Organizing Neural Intelligence as a Testbed for Autonomous Science
records.tldr: PD-NCA AutoLab creates a differentiable, self-organizing virtual lab where agents can hypothesize, intervene, and learn mechanisms before touching wet labs, with benchmarks for recovery, reversal planning, open-ended discovery, and auditability.

records.title: ACHT-World: Causal World Models for Closed-Loop Self-Driving Laboratories
records.tldr: ACHT-World turns self-driving labs from optimize-this engines into causal discovery systems by maintaining an explicit mechanistic belief state, choosing experiments for information gain, and logging replayable, auditable decision traces.

records.title: Audited Causal Discovery Agents for Brain Resilience and Alzheimer's Reversal
records.tldr: Resilience-ADA frames Alzheimer's reversal research as audited causal discovery, using explicit world models, BOED-chosen perturbations, reliability gates, and Decision Cards to rank targets and design falsifiable experiment ladders.

records.title: Application of Automatic Differentiation and Optimization with PDE Constraints to Forward and Inverse Problems
records.tldr: We show how a differentiable implicit solver can be built on the basis of any automatic differentiation framework and illustrate its application to self-supervised grid coarsening and inverse problems.

records.title: Towards Data-Driven Nonlocal Density Functionals: Deep Learning DFT with Attention to approach Chemical Accuracy
records.tldr: The model employs an encoder–decoder design with a nonlocal block that refines B3LYP-like exchange–correlation terms (including D3BJ dispersion) through learned smooth enhancement factors while preserving the analytic hybrid structure.

records.title: Synthetic Geology: Structural Geology Meets Deep Learning
records.tldr: Using a geological simulation engine we generate synthetic data and use them to train a generative flow-matching model. The resulting foundation model can reconstruct multiple plausible 3D scenarios from surface topography and sparse borehole data.

records.title: SemiMat: A Semi-Supervised Toolkit for Data-Scarce Materials Property Prediction
records.tldr: A Unified Semi-Supervised Toolkit for Data-Scarce Materials Property Prediction

records.title: Physics-informed local-global underground fluid flow modeling with multiple sinks
records.tldr: Physics-informed ML approach for predicting the pressure field in porous media with multiple sinks.

records.title: FedAdaPriv-CPU: Adaptive Differential Privacy with Frozen Backbone for Resource-Constrained Federated Medical Imaging
MOFology: Ontologically-Grounded MOF Knowledge Graph and Prediction Framework
records.tldr: We present a large ontologically grounded MOF knowledge graph and prediction framework based on joint semantic-chemical features, and present its usefulness in direct air capture research.

records.title: Autonomous Optimization of Perovskite Solar Cell Thin Films via Robotic Spin-Coating and Bayesian Optimization
records.tldr: We developed a fully automated, closed-loop robotic spin-coating platform driven by Bayesian optimization to autonomously optimize perovskite solar cell materials.

records.title: LabDroid “Maholo”-Centered Automation and Autonomization of Life Science Experiments
IFC-QA: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Reliability over Industrial Building Information Model
records.tldr: We introduce IFC-QA, a model-independent benchmark with five reasoning complexity levels for evaluating LLM reliability over building information models

records.title: When Designs Explain Themselves: Report Cards for Evolutionary LLMs
AI-Assisted Architected Cementitious Microstructures for Durable and Low-Carbon Infrastructure
records.tldr: AI-driven framework to design TPMS-inspired internal geometries (Gyroid, Schwarz Primitive) in 3D-printed cementitious building blocks — targeting reduced material, strength prediction, and lower embodied carbon for infrastructure applications.

records.title: Accelerating Catalyst Design via AI: High-Throughput Screening and Machine Learning Reveal Defect-Enhanced Activity in Pt-Au Nanoclusters
records.tldr: AI-driven evolutionary search and machine learning reveal that graphene defects activate gold atoms and trigger dynamic restructuring in Pt-Au nanoclusters, enabling highly efficient low-temperature CO oxidation.

records.title: Dyna-STTN: Distilling Physical Dynamics into Spatio-Temporal Transformer Network for Weather Forecasting
records.tldr: Dyna-STTN distills physical PDE constraints into a Spatio-Temporal Transformer, achieving up to 22.5% of maximum  RMSE reduction in weather forecasting

records.title: Label-Efficient Battery SOH Estimation via Domain-Aware Self-Supervised Learning
Learning Arrow Pushing for Reaction Space Prediction and Exploration
records.tldr: By explicitly modeling discrete electron-flow events rather than just mapping reactants to products, our model Reactron achieves superior, mechanistically interpretable reaction prediction and enables large-scale, automated reaction discovery.

records.title: From Model to Molecule: Rapid Discovery of Potent CDK2 Inhibitors Using Boltz-2
records.tldr: Boltz-2 enables a closed-loop computational–experimental workflow that translates large-scale virtual screening into experimentally validated CDK2 inhibitors.

records.title: TropicalField-Tandem: Physics-Informed Indoor$\to$Outdoor Translation and Uncertainty-Aware Forecasting for Perovskite–Si Tandem Reliability
records.tldr: A physics-informed, uncertainty-aware framework and paired dataset for translating short-term indoor stability measurements of perovskite-silicon tandems into accurate long-term tropical field reliability forecasts.

records.title: Predicting mechanisms and outcomes of complex radical cascades via a hybrid, network-QM-AI approach
records.tldr: A hybrid quantum–mechanistic reaction network framework enables accurate prediction of complex multi-step radical cascade mechanisms and product distributions.

records.title: Simulation-to-Experiment Transfer Learning for XRD-Based Autoencoder Modeling of SOEC Half-Cell Materials
Data-driven uncertainty-aware forecasting of sea ice conditions in the gulf of Ob based on satellite radar imagery
records.tldr: Uncertainty awareness allows the deep learning models to produce more reliable forecasts of sea ice based on satellite radar images

records.title: ZKBioVault: A Privacy-Preserving Biometric Authentication Framework for Fraud-Resilient Financial Identity Management
records.tldr: A novel methodology that aims to protect biometrics using AI liveness detection, cancellable biometrics, fuzzy vault and zero knowledge proofs for enrolment and authentication.

records.title: An Explainable Conversational AI Framework for the Discovery of Cobalt Electrocatalysts in Industrial Water Electrolysis
records.tldr: We developed an explainable conversational AI framework to navigate vast chemical spaces, successfully discovering a highly active and durable high-entropy cobalt catalyst for industrial PEM water electrolysis.

records.title: Expanding catalyst discovery across material classes by machine learning
records.tldr: We developed a cross-material deep learning framework that integrates experimental datasets from distinct catalyst classes to extrapolate and experimentally validate high-performance catalysts in a previously unexplored material group.

records.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: A Two-Phase Non-Parametric Retrieval Workflow for Corporate Credit Underwriting
records.tldr: We propose a two-phase, utility‑aware retrieval and re-ranking system that improves financial document analysis for corporate credit underwriting by bridging the gap between semantic similarity and actual decision value.

records.title: Bayesian Optimization-Guided Experimental Design for Graphene-Reinforced Cementitious Composites
records.tldr: Bayesian optimization guided by Gaussian Process regression accelerates the discovery of high-performance graphene-reinforced cement composites

records.title: Mapping diverse structures of liquid water and ice using variational autoencoders: A vector quantization approach to discover structural motifs in model latent spaces
records.tldr: We present a vector-quantization and variational autoencoder approach to map structural motifs of ice and water from molecular dynamics simulations.

records.title: Towards ab-initio quality description of porous materials: Developing general Machine-Learned Potentials to simulate physical and adsorption properties of Metal-Organic Frameworks
records.tldr: We present a series of generalizable Machine Learned Potential for simulating the mechanical and adsorption properties of Metal-Organic Frameworks.

records.title: Large Language Model Agents Enable Autonomous Design and Image Analysis of Microwell Microfluidics
ADMET Scoring Models for Real-World Drug Design
records.tldr: To solve ADMET bottlenecks in drug discovery, our pipeline uses LLMs to mine real-world literature data, meta/pairwise learning to mitigate batch effects, and a novel aNDCG metric for robust, practical evaluation of predictive models.

records.title: High-Throughput In-Device Screening of Printable Lead-Free Halide Perovskite Memristors via Machine Learning-Driven Optimization
records.tldr: High-throughput printable fabrication + ML screening of lead-free halide perovskites directly in-device, revealing key compositional descriptors for rational memristor design.

records.title: ESS-MOTIFS: Discovering Rubric-Aligned Motifs for Cohort-Level Essay Assessment
records.tldr: ESS-MOTIFS is a rubric-aligned motif analysis framework that identifies prevalent patterns across essays and uses retrieval-augmented LLMs to generate synthesized summaries, enabling interpretable, auditable, and scalable cohort-level assessment.

records.title: Materealize: a multi-agent deliberation system for end-to-end material design and synthesis
records.tldr: Materealize is a multi-agent framework for end-to-end materials discovery. Compared with tool-only workflows, it adds mechanism-level synthesis guidance, reaches 91.4% top-5 precursor prediction accuracy, and expands realizable design space by 8.3%.

records.title: SciAgent: Containerized Code Generation for Scientific Computing with Verification
records.tldr: SciAgent, an open-source LLM-agnostic scientific coding agent with 25+ containerized environments and multi-layer verification.

records.title: Accelerated Discovery and Characterization of Nanoscale-Covalent Organic Frameworks for Photocatalytic Water Splitting
records.tldr: A Chemspeed-based automated platform enables standardized nanoCOF synthesis and rapid image-driven characterization for photocatalytic hydrogen evolution.

records.title: Literature-Grounded LLMs for Predicting High Ionic Conductivity Solid-State Electrolytes
records.tldr: We present a literature-grounded, fine-tuned LLM that predicts ionic conductivity of solid-state electrolytes and, combined with HTVS and MLIP-based MD, identifies stable high-conductivity candidates from Materials Project.

records.title: Flow-Matching-Based Posterior Sampling for Single-Shot Phase Retrieval in Cryo-EM
records.tldr: A single-shot phase retrieval method for cryo-electron microscopy that utilizes a learned flow-matching prior and physics-based posterior sampling to reconstruct high-contrast biomolecular structures from noisy, intensity-only measurements.

records.title: Model–Data Coevolution as the Basis of Stateful, Problem-Scoped Materials Databases
Beyond Known Archetypes: A Generative AI Framework for Inverse Design of Flat-Band Materials from Geometric Outliers
HSG-12M: A Large-Scale Benchmark of Spatial Multigraphs from the Energy Spectra of Non-Hermitian Crystals
Evaluating Chemistry-Guided Filtering Heuristics Using LLM-Extracted Reaction SMILES
records.tldr: Fine-tuned GPT improved USPTO reaction extraction (62.9%→92.0%). Rare-template heuristic showed lowest FNR (8%), best identifying true data quality issues over extraction errors.

records.title: Quantum Annealing-Driven Active Learning Benchmark for Nanophotonic Design
Machine Learning-Based Optimization of SOC Windows for High-Performance μ-Si Anodes
Closed-loop Optimization of Mono-functionalization via Suzuki-Miyaura Reaction
records.tldr: An autonomous closed loop system optimized discrete ligand, base, and solvent combinations to achieve selective mono functionalization in Suzuki Miyaura coupling.

records.title: Automated Process Synthesis via Generative AI-based Dual-Loop Simulation and Optimization
Predictive Modeling for Quantitative Compositional Engineering of InZnHfO Thin-Film Transistors
Simulation-to-Real Alignment for Cryo-EM Image Modeling via Conditional GAN-Based Refinement
Enhancing Synaptic Plasticity and Multistate Retention of Organic Neuromorphic Devices Using Anion-Excessive Gel Electrolyte
Partial-Physics Pretraining for Transfer-Learning in Computational Aerodynamics
Chiropto-Neuromorphic Devices Based on a Photocatalytic Dye/Polymer Semiconductor Bulk Heterojunction for Circularly Polarized Light Detection and Memorization
records.tldr: We developed a scalable, low-power chiropto-neuromorphic device that converts circularly polarized light into stable synaptic memory states for polarization-encoded neuromorphic computing.

records.title: Spectrum-Aware Quantum Control beyond Classical Spectral Access
Improving Value Chain Transparency in Bioprocess Life Cycle Assessment Using Surrogate Models
Inferring the hidden and long-range dengue transmission routes in Singapore
records.tldr: We used ML to uncover hidden dengue transmission networks in Singapore directly from routine case data. By combining a mechanistic epidemic model with scalable network inference, we found transmission links to guide intervention strategies.

records.title: AI in Life Cycle Assessment
records.tldr: How to generate data to enable AI in LCA

records.title: The Open Catalyst 2025 (OC25) Dataset and Models for Solid-Liquid Interfaces
records.tldr: In this work, we introduce the Open Catalyst 2025 (OC25) dataset and models for solid-liquid interfaces  to shed light on fundamental aspects of the (electro)chemical transformation technologies.

records.title: Reinforcement Learning to Increase Nuclear Fusion Efficiency
records.tldr: We are developing a reinforcement learning system to increase fusion efficiency of our Thunderbird Reactor

records.title: Automated Bulk Intermetallic Synthesis via Orchestrated Heterogeneous Laboratory Machines
records.tldr: We present a flexible ROS2-based execution layer that enables automated synthesis of bulk intermetallic materials.
keywords: Orchestration of robots for execution layer

records.title: Development of a Scalable High-Throughput Platform for Plasmid Transfection in 3D Mammalian Cell Culture
records.tldr: We are developing a scalable automated plasmid transfection platform for 3D mammalian cell culture to accelerate drug discovery.

records.title: Can We Automate Scientific Reasoning in Closed-Loop Experiments using Large Language Models?
records.tldr: We systematically compare BO, hybrid LLM+BO, and LLM-only methods in closed-loop experiments, finding that LLM-only approaches often match or outperform alternatives under fixed budgets, while exhibiting problem-dependent strengths and limitations.
keywords: Large Language Models (LLMs); scientific reasoning; automated experimentation; Bayesian optimisation (BO)

records.title: Benchmarking Foundation Potentials against Quantum Chemistry Methods for Predicting Molecular Redox Potentials
Discovery of flat-band 2D materials via physics-informed scoring and structure-based learning
records.tldr: A data-driven framework uncovers flat-band 2D materials with 98% prediction accuracy, verified by quantum calculations.

records.title: Anomalyspy: A Generative Defect Localization in Semiconductor Packages, with X-Ray Microscopy
records.tldr: This paper present Anomalyspy, a VQ-VAE–based framework for detecting and localizing defects in semiconductor packaging from X-ray microscopy data, enabling scalable and reliable failure analysis even when trained on minimally defective samples

records.title: Hybrid Computational Strategy for Predicting Complex Ligand–Metal Architectures
records.tldr: Researchers developed a hybrid ML and X-Ray structure knowledge-based strategy designed to accurately predict metal–ligand coordination modalities to streamline the rational design of transition metal complexes and catalysts.

records.title: Quality-Diversity LLM for Generative Design
Smarter Electrolysis in Rock Reactors
records.tldr: Bayesian optimization is proposed to tune Rock Reactor electrolysis parameters to overcome impractical grid-search optimization and maximize CO2 mineralization per unit energy input.

records.title: Membrane Optimization for Electrochemical CO₂ Storage
records.tldr: We will use multi-objective Bayesian optimization and flexible automation to simultaneously optimize membrane conductivity and divalent cation permselectivity.

records.title: HELIOS - Holistic Experiment Learning Intelligent Orchestration System
records.tldr: HELIOS is an agent-native orchestration framework for self-driving labs that decomposes closed-loop experimentation, enabling the system to improve not only the experiments it proposes but also the process by which it proposes them.

records.title: Neurosymbolic Guardrails for World-Model Digital Twins: Securing AI-Driven Scientific Discovery and Autonomy
records.tldr: This paper presents neurosymbolic guardrails for securing world-model digital twins in AI-driven scientific systems, integrating provenance-aware decision-making with physical safety constraints.

records.title: Conditional Diffusion for Storage Performance Modeling
records.tldr: We build on the vendor-agnostic, measurement driven framework, which formulates the task as learning 𝑝 (𝑦 | 𝑥) from measurements and evaluates generative surrogates using distributional metrics.

records.title: Using genetic algorithms to explore compositional space of perovskite thin film
records.tldr: We succefully show that genetic algorithms can be use to enhance optoelectronics properties of semi-conductor thin films using light.

records.title: Designing of Microfluidic Concentration Generator Module for Self-Driving Fluid Mixing System
records.tldr: Microfluidic concentration generator modules are rapidly designed via circuit-analogy optimization and DLP printing to enable precise, automated mixing in self-driving labs.

records.title: Scaling Multilingual E-Commerce with GenAI: Content Generation and Sentiment Analysis for Low-Resource Languages
AI stretch-grid model for kilometre-scale weather prediction over deep tropics
records.tldr: AI stretch-grid model for kilometre-scale weather prediction over deep tropics

records.title: PERELMAN: Pipeline for scientific literature meta-analysis
AFPFusionLM: A Hybrid Sequence–Structure Protein Language Model for Antifreeze Protein Function Prediction
records.tldr: We propose AFPFusionLM, a hybrid sequence–structure protein language model, trained with classification and supervised contrastive objectives, achieving state-of-the-art antifreeze protein prediction and enabling closed-loop design.

records.title: Large Language Model Assisted Optimisation of Photocatalytic Hydrogen Production
records.tldr: Using LLM to direct a bayesian optimser in an actual closed-loop chemistry experiment

records.title: From Molecules to Materials and Proteins: Flow Autoencoders as Lossless and Unified Tokenizers
Exiaa: Explainable Injections for Adversarial Attack
records.tldr: We introduce a novel non-iterative model agnostic black-box attack to explanations by exploiting an intrinsic flaw of neural networks and post-hoc explainable methods.

records.title: An Integrated Platform for In Situ Electroanalytical–Driven Reaction Optimization
records.tldr: In situ electroanalysis is integrated into a novel high-throughput electrosynthesis platform to enable physically grounded, data-efficient machine-learning-guided reaction optimization.

records.title: Robotic Kneading for Organic Reactions: A Deterministic Platform for Data-Driven Synthesis in Semi-Solid Media
records.tldr: We propose kneading as a robot-native reaction modality in which mechanical input can be explicitly parameterized, enabling direct integration of actuation, material response, and chemical transformation for data-driven optimization.

records.title: Digitalizing Slurry Mixing for an Electrode Fabrication SDLs
records.tldr: We propose a Self-Driving Lab (SDL) framework that includes digitalization of high-viscosity slurry mixing—a cornerstone of battery electrode manufacturing—via the ‘PMCL' library.

records.title: Automated and Interpretable Experimental Platform for Process-Structure-Property Analysis via Raman Spectroscopy
records.tldr: This research presents an automated platform using a robotic arm to integrate Raman spectroscopy as a physicochemical bridge, enabling the data-driven prediction and interpretation of mechanical properties based on 3D printing process conditions.

records.title: Combining robotic deposition tools and advanced characterization to enable ML-guided material discovery
records.tldr: Using two robotic platforms and model systems, we show how combining automated material synthesis with advanced characterisation techniques as well as a high-quality data infrastructure enables machine learning guided accelerated materials discovery.

records.title: Robot-Enabled Biofabrication of Tissue Cultures with Micrometer-Scale Precision
records.tldr: Robotic system leveraging multimodal feedback to enable automated execution of high precision material handling tasks for tissue culture.

records.title: Development of a Platform for Sustainable Metal-Organic Framework (MOF) Synthesis, MABIL: MOF Automation using Biomass-Inspired Linkers
records.tldr: Automated platform for discovery and synthesis of sustainable metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) from biomass

records.title: The Medicinal Chemistry Self-Driving Lab - Accelerating Hit Optimisation with a Direct to Biology Approach
records.tldr: The use of parallel synthesis and direct to biology assays guided by AI/ML for the iterative design, synthesis, testing and analysis of small molecule protein binders will help to accelerate the early hit to lead optimization phase of drug discovery.

records.title: A low-cost, high-throughput solid dosing platform for self-driving laboratories
records.tldr: A module for rapid wellplate dosing of solids was developed and applied towards high-throughput solubility studies

records.title: Kinetic study of the aqueous Kolbe-Schmitt reaction enabled by automated reaction analysis
Rapid, Room Temperature Synthesis of a Biomass-Derived, Recyclable Copper Metal-Organic Framework Utilizing Automation for CO2 Capture
records.tldr: Rapid, room temperature discovery of a MOF from biomass which can be used for carbon capture and synthesised using an automated platform.

records.title: El Agente Forjador: Task-Driven Agent Generation for Quantum Simulation
records.tldr: A system that builds AI agents by your tasks

records.title: Autonomous Discovery of Pareto-Optimal Gas-Diffusion Electrodes
records.tldr: Ada-Carbon autonomously mapped the Pareto front of gas-diffusion electrode fabrication, resolving trade-offs among uniformity, hydrophobicity, and conductivity of electrodes to guide fabrication recipe selection.

records.title: A Flexible, Code-Free, and Scalable Workflow for Structured Data Extraction from CO2 Electrochemical Reduction Literature
records.tldr: A non-coder-oriented structure data extraction workflow examplified in CO2RR literature set

records.title: NeCLO: Neural Convolutional Learning Optimizer for Electromagnetics
records.tldr: We introduce NeCLO (Neural Convolutional Learning Optimizer), a hardware-accelerated differentiable solver that maps FDTD to 3D convolutions, achieving bit-exact numerical fidelity for accurate, physics-driven inverse design.

records.title: Beyond Greedy Acquisition: A Distribution-Aware Active Learning Framework for Molecular Discovery
records.tldr: This research proposes a distribution-aware active learning framework that controls training trajectories to improve sample efficiency under distribution shift
keywords: Active Learning ，Curriculum Learning，Out-of-Distribution Generalization ，Molecular Property Prediction

records.title: Single-Shot Phase Retrieval in Cryo–EM via Latent Conditional Diffusion Model
records.tldr: We propose a latent conditional diffusion framework for cryo-EM phase retrieval.

records.title: A Provenance-First, AI-Ready Data Platform for Large-Scale Memristor Experiments
records.tldr: STARS is a provenance-first, AI-ready database for memristor experiments, linking process/location context, measurements, and derived features with end-to-end quality control for reproducible datasets and AI workflows.

records.title: MatSeek: An Automated Knowledge-Driven Framework for Materials Research
FHIR-Driven Medical Network Traffic Simulation for Multi-Departmental Healthcare Security Testing
records.tldr: Reconstruction of network level events using open-source FHIR representations of the MIMIC-IV database to create digital twins of hospital networks.

records.title: Multi-fidelity Bayesian optimisation for DFT-in-the-loop discovery of  manufacturable homogeneous catalysts, auxiliaries, and ligands.
records.tldr: By combining asynchronous scheduling with multi-fidelity, multi-objective, multi-batch Bayesian optimisation, we transform DFT from a post hoc mechanistic tool into a scalable predictive platform for catalyst, auxiliary, and ligand discovery.

records.title: Bayesian optimization for self-driving liquid coating laboratory
records.tldr: Bayesian optimization for coating layer profiles.

records.title: Scalable Low-Cost Laboratory Automation: A Digital Twin-Integrated Robotic Platform for Autonomous Liquid Handling
ReactionEye: Integrating GC–MS Data and Chemical Context for Multimodal Structure Elucidation in Reaction Screening
records.tldr: ReactionEye is a multimodal framework that automates molecular structure elucidation from GC–MS data by jointly interpreting mass spectra and chemical reaction context to enable scalable reaction screening.

records.title: Application of digitization and large language models for digital twins in permanent magnet materials
records.tldr: This work investigates the use of plot digitization and LLMs in the development of a digital twin framework for permanent magnets.

records.title: Exploration and simulation of emergent magnetic materials via AI-driven workflows
records.tldr: I illustrate the complexity of simulating magnetism in emergent materials and introduce an AI-automated platform for simulation

records.title: Data-Driven Detection of Nonlinear Mode Interactions Using Post-Hoc Interpretable Deep Learning
records.tldr: A methodology combining deep learning and post-hoc interpretability to categorize structural interaction regimes from multi-modal time-series histories without manual feature extraction.

records.title: Robotic Mechanochemical Synthesis of HKUST-1 with Process Monitoring
BRIDGE: Bootstrapping Text to Control Time-Series Generation via Multi-Agent Iterative Optimization and Diffusion Modeling
records.tldr: A multi-agent framework for synthesising timeseries paired with textual descriptions

records.title: MIRA: Medical Time Series Foundation Model for Real-World Health Data
records.tldr: Foundational model for medical time series

records.title: EGMOF: Efficient Generation of Metal-Organic Frameworks Using a Hybrid Diffusion- Transformer Architecture
records.tldr: EGMOF is a modular diffusion-transformer framework that generates MOF structures from target properties, delivering high accuracy with little data and avoiding retraining for new properties.

records.title: An automatically generated reaction network for the synthesis of hBN using the Molecular High-Index Saddle Dynamics Search method
PieLoT — LLM-driven Toolbox for Theorem Proving Education
Resource-efficient Bayesian optimization for self-calibrating liquid handling
records.tldr: This work presents a data-efficient, closed-loop Bayesian optimization framework that automatically calibrates liquid-handling robots, improving accuracy and repeatability across liquids and volumes while eliminating manual, non-scalable tuning.

records.title: El Agente Gráfico: Structured Execution Graph for Scientific Agents
DIY, Modular Automation Platform Built from Affordable Components for Directed Evolution and Molecular Biology, Toward Closed-Loop Workflows
records.tldr: Combining an OT-2 open-source liquid handler with an xArm six-axis arm for cap handling, thermal control and magnetic separation, our system ran reliable, long, minimally supervised selections to isolate target-binding peptides.

records.title: An Autonomous Discovery Platform for Inorganic Photovoltaic Absorbers Beyond Lead Halide Perovskites
records.tldr: We demonstrate how autonomous materials discovery can efficiently navigate the vast inorganic design space to identify new photovoltaic absorbers for tandem solar cells.

records.title: Yield Prediction of Organic Reactions in Biased Datasets via Positive-Unlabeled Learning
records.tldr: ML models trained on literature data are often limited by a lack of negative examples. We show that PU learning can be used to find "reliable negatives" from unlabeled data, enabling the training of robust yield prediction models on biased datasets.

records.title: Computational investigation and generation of site-disordered sodium ion cathode materials
records.tldr: inverse design of sodium-ion cathode materials with machine learning interatomic potentials capable of efficiently and accurately describing various site-disordered phases within the phase space.

records.title: PlateOpt: Bayesian Optimization for Organic Catalysis in Combinatorial Well Plates
records.tldr: Bayesian Optimization for Organic Catalysis in Combinatorial Well plates

records.title: SWORD: A compositional disorder-aware crystal representation for cross-dataset curation and disordered novelty assessment
records.tldr: SWORD is a compositional disorder-aware, Wyckoff-resolved string representation that enables database-scale deduplication and novelty screening across ordered and disordered crystal structures.

records.title: Transformers with Physics-informed encodings and Simulation-Based inference for robust Gravitational-Wave detection in Pulsar Timing Array data
records.tldr: A physics-informed Transformer with simulation-based inference enables fast, accurate posterior estimation of eccentric gravitational-wave signals in pulsar timing array data.

records.title: Machine Learning-Assisted Search for Skyrmion-Hosting Heterostructures for Device Applications
Multi-Modal Classification of Extended 1D Cellular Automata
The Zintl–Klemm Concept in the Amorphous State: A Case Study of Na–P Battery Anodes
records.tldr: We show that the Zintl–Klemm concept, traditionally used for crystals, can also explain the local bonding and stability of amorphous Na–P phases in sodium-ion battery anodes using first-principles and machine-learning methods.

records.title: Beyond Point Sampling: Autonomous Phase Mapping of Biologic Formulation Stability via Hierarchical and Manifold Active Learning
records.tldr: We present a hierarchical active learning to efficinetly learn phase diagrams of bioformulations with heterogenous design variables.

records.title: Accelerating Ammonia Decomposition Catalyst Discovery with AI
records.tldr: We combine generative AI, predictive modelling, and high-throughput experiments to rapidly discover low cost and synthesizable ammonia decomposition catalysts that outperform industrial benchmarks.

records.title: Bayesian Optimization for the Inverse Problems in Materials Science
records.tldr: How Bayesian optimization can be adapted for high-dimensional inverse design problems in materials science

records.title: From In Silico Design to Automated Synthesis: An AI-Driven Framework for Late-Stage Functionalization
Machine Learning-Based Surrogate Models for Performance Prediction of Triboelectric Nanogenerators
records.tldr: We present a machine learning–based surrogate model that predicts the open-circuit voltage of triboelectric nanogenerators by bridging atomic-scale material properties and device-level performance.
keywords: Machine Learning; Energy Harvesters; Triboelectric Nanogenerators; Surrogate Model

records.title: A Connected Workflow to Streamline Tablet Manufacture and Dissolution Testing
records.tldr: Connected workflow to accelerate the execution of dissolution of directly compacted tablets

records.title: Black-box Membership Inference Attacks on Synthetic Text via N-gram Overlap
Electronic Circuit Optimization With Graph and Sheaf Neural Networks
records.tldr: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) to automate Gate-Level Pruning (GLP)

records.title: An Automated, Calibration-Free Platform for High-Throughput Reaction Screening and Data Analysis
Physical model-informed automated reaction optimization within a digital platform
records.tldr: We propose a digital platform that couples physical models with automated chemical robotics to advance sustainable chemical reaction.

records.title: Active Learning Interatomic Potentials-Enhanced Molecular Dynamics for Grain Boundary Engineering in Antiperovskite Solid Electrolytes
keywords: AI-driven materials modeling; grain boundary transport; machine learning interatomic potentials; active learning; solid-state electrolytes; lithium-ion conductivity

records.title: Generative Design and Experimental Validation of Non-Fullerene Acceptors for Photovoltaics
records.tldr: An integrated ML-driven pipeline for non-fullerene acceptor discovery in OPVs combines generative design, predictive models, and expert-guided synthesis. Seven DPP-based candidates were identified with predicted PCEs up to 11.8%

records.title: Democratizing Microscopy Training through Digital Surrogates
Toward Self-Driven Microscopy Exploration for the Characterization of Functional Materials
records.tldr: An integrated self-driving microscopy for the characterization of functional materials

records.title: Defending Federated Learning: Adaptive Integration of Differential Privacy, SMPC, and Byzantine Robustness
records.tldr: Integrate differential privacy, secure multi-party computation, and Byzantine-robust aggregation into a single federated learning framework that adapts security parameters in real time based on threat levels and resource constraints

records.title: LLM-Powered Autonomous Agents for Spintronic Device Optimization: From Rule-Based to AI-Driven Design
records.tldr: We develop an autonomous AI agent powered by GPT-4's function calling to optimize magnetic skyrmion in-memory compute devices.

records.title: Towards Optimal Mixing: Enabling Autonomous Experimentation via Quantitative Emulsion Assessment
records.tldr: A real-time, non-destructive metric is proposed for quantitative evaluation of emulsification process toward closed-loop autonomous optimization.

records.title: Platonic representation of foundation machine learning interatomic potentials
records.tldr: Here, we show that independently developed MLIPs exhibit statistically consistent geometric organisation, which we term the Platonic representation.

records.title: Challenging to formulation through autonomous experiments and consideration of digital twin framework application
Generalized convolutional many-body distribution functional representations
records.tldr: I will discuss a novel representation of atoms in their environment that can be used as a feature for machine learning
keywords: physics aware machine learning; chemical compound space; first principles;

records.title: La Agente Optima – orchestrated Bayesian optimization and active learning for accelerated in-silico compound discovery
records.tldr: La Agente Optima: An agentic AI framework that combines Bayesian optimization with autonomous orchestration of high-fidelity electronic-structure calculations and wet-lab experiments for closed-loop scientific discovery.

records.title: Data-Driven Property Prediction for Memristor Resistive Switching Layers
records.tldr: We benchmark data-driven ML models for materials in memristors against an experimental ground truth auto-extracted from the literature corpus.

records.title: Self Driving Discovery of Immersion Cooling Fluids for Data Center
records.tldr: Self-driving lab integrates high-throughput thermophysical property measurements with chemistry-informed ML to accelerate thermal-fluid discovery, improving heat capacity and flowability, with validated system-level cooling performance.

records.title: Accurate and rapid measurement of fluid thermal conductivity
records.tldr: This research introduces a rapid, microfluidic, self-calibrating method for measuring thermal conductivity using minimal sample volumes, enabling accurate, high-throughput screening of heat transfer fluids for accelerated materials discovery.

records.title: EMOS: The Unified AI Platform for Electronic Materials Discovery
records.tldr: A modular, open-source framework that unifies databases, generative models, and prediction models into composable workflows, accelerating interoperable AI-driven electronic materials discovery.

records.title: OnsagerFlow: Learning mesoscopic dynamics from microscopic simulation
records.tldr: We present OnsagerFlow, a data-driven approach that utilizes the Fluctuation-Dissipation Theorem to learn quantitatively accurate, interpretable stochastic PDEs from microscopic spin data.

records.title: Learning Permutation-invariant Macroscopic Dynamics
A Self-Driving Lab for Novel Energy Material Discovery
records.tldr: A presentation of a self-driving lab for novel energy material discovery, utilizing magnetron sputtering and physical vapor deposition.

records.title: Sparse Global Mixing via Compact-Support Graph Kernels
records.tldr: Design a novel sparse graph interaction mechanism that is scalable in linear time complexity with the strength of unity.

records.title: A topological equilibrated configuration space analysis of nanoparticle systems
records.tldr: We apply topological methods to summarise and visualise the high-dimensional configuration space of 2D colloidal nanoparticle system, while exposing its complex phase structure.

records.title: Event driven neural network on a mixed signal neuromorphic processor for detecting EEG based epileptic seizure
records.tldr: We present a co-designed, event-driven pipeline that converts EEG signals into spikes and runs a hardware-mapped SNN on the mixed-signal neuromorphic DYNAP-SE2 processor to detect epileptic seizures in real time at ultra-low power.

records.title: CryoEM 2D classification with translational and rotational invariant features
records.tldr: Using translationally and rotationally invariant feature manifold to vector quantize and do 2D classification for the CryoEM images.

records.title: Learning non-equilibrium mesoscopic dynamics with Onsager principle
records.tldr: We propose Spectral OnsagerNet, a novel operator learning framework that enforces the Generalized Onsager Principle to learn dissipative PDE dynamics, offering superior accuracy and physical interpretability compared to standard baselines.

records.title: ChemSIE: From Document Based Records to Machine Actionable Experimental Data
records.tldr: Large experimental data sources that can be untapped for future ML woek

records.title: A Multi-agent Framework for Physical Laws Discovery
Test-Time Self-Evolution in Multi-Agent Systems for Materials Discovery
Better Protein Function Prediction by Modeling Survivorship Bias
DarkMatterFM: An Agentic Foundation Model for Multimodal Dark-Matter Inference with GPU-Accelerated Emulators
records.tldr: DarkMatterFM is an agentic foundation-model system that routes any dark-matter theory to GPU-accelerated emulators and probe likelihoods to deliver fast, auditable multimodal constraints.

records.title: The Geopolitics of AI Driven Scientific Discovery: Uneven Geographies of Self Driving Laboratories
records.tldr: This paper maps the global deployment and collaboration networks of Self-Driving Laboratories to evaluate their emergence as infrastructures of scientific discovery and competition.

records.title: Future-Proofing Data for Catalyst Fingerprinting and Better Design Validation
records.tldr: On-line concentration -vs- time datasets of reaction networks is useful for catalyst fingerprinting and benchmarking. This should prove indispensable for validation of in silico developed catalysts.

records.title: Accelerating small organic molecules scale up with data-rich experimentation
keywords: Small molecules; scale up; automation; self-driving lab

records.title: An automated gel screening platform
records.tldr: An automated gel screening platform was developed that increases throughput of gel formulation discovery.

records.title: Conceptualising Case Formulation as a Neurosymbolic AI Framework for Mental Health
records.tldr: We conceptualise clinical case formulation as a neurosymbolic AI architecture that supports efficient case formulation for psychotherapy triage.

records.title: iGRASP: A Modular Platform for Improved, Graph-Based Spectra Prediction
records.tldr: Using our custom framework, we developed the currently best model for mass spectra prediction.

records.title: MiST: Understanding the Role of Mid-Stage Scientific Training in Developing Chemical Reasoning Models
keywords: chemical reasoning model; large language model

records.title: MicroMAP: A Material Acceleration Platform for the Synthesis of Organic Nanoparticle Dispersions
records.tldr: A microfluidic MAP was developed to automatically synthesize, characterize and optimize organic nanoparticle dispersions for the fabrication of organic optoelectronic devices.

records.title: RAISE: A self-driving laboratory for interfacial property formulation discovery
Recent developments and applications of the machine-learned moment tensor potentials
records.tldr: We are discussing recent methodological developments done with MTP model and recent applications where MTP showed its efficiency.

records.title: A reinforcement learning approach to generate equivalent circuit models for Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy
records.tldr: We propose a generative reinforcement learning framework for automated discovery of equivalent circuit models from EIS data that enables flexible exploration of circuit topologies without predefined classes or ground-truth labels.

records.title: Atom-in-molecule based quantum machine learning  of defect formation energies
An Autoregressive Approach For Material Generation
records.tldr: We present an autoregressive transformer which treats the crystal structure as a sequence by quantizing the unit cell, enabling fast training and inference while also achieving high structural accuracy.

records.title: Autonomous Search for Grinding Conditions using Robots and Bayesian Optimization
records.tldr: A robotic system with force-feedback control and Bayesian optimization autonomously searches for grinding conditions to achieve target particle size distributions.

records.title: AtomWorld: A Benchmark for Evaluating Spatial Reasoning in Large Language Models on Crystalline Materials
High-index saddle dynamics for the automated mapping of reaction routes
records.tldr: A new method for finding molecular saddle-points and reaction paths.

records.title: AdsorbFlow: energy-conditioned flow matching enables fast and realistic adsorbate placement
records.tldr: AdsorbFlow is an energy-conditioned rigid-body flow-matching model for adsorbate placement. Under OC20-Dense, it reaches 45.5% DFT success at N=1 and 61.4% at N=10 with 5-step sampling.

records.title: From Visual Vocabulary to Grammar: An Interpretable Paradigm for Scientific Discovery in Spatiotemporal Data
records.tldr: An interpretable, unsupervised pipeline that turns spatiotemporal videos into discrete spatial “tokens” and a transition “grammar,” enabling discovery, comparison, and classification of dynamical regimes without labels.

records.title: GoFlow: efficient transition state geometry prediction with flow matching and E(3)-equivariant neural networks
records.tldr: Generate transition state geometries of chemical reactions with flow matching

records.title: Machine learning reveals transferable rules for predicting grain boundary segregation
AI-Enabled 3D Glare Assessment Framework for Urban Solar Planning
records.tldr: We propose an AI-assisted, georeferenced 3D framework that casts urban photovoltaic glare analysis as a constraint-based planning problem, enabling scalable and obstruction-aware decision support for dense cities and airports.

records.title: Predictive mass spectrometry from quantum-mechanical fragmentation and intensity modelling
records.tldr: A new technique for predicting mass spectra.

records.title: Mapping Materials Science: a multi-modal toolbox to curate broad synthesis procedure databases from scientific literature
records.tldr: We demonstrate the first automated linking of synthesis procedures with performance data from scientific literature, extracting from 81k papers and validating through a thermocatalysis case study to enable predictive materials design.

records.title: A Self-Driving Closed-Loop Workflow for Data-Efficient Kinetic Modeling and Op-timization of the Aldol Reaction
records.tldr: A self-driving workflow autonomously optimizes the aldol reaction by integrating robotic experimentation, real-time HPLC monitoring, and kinetic modeling for data-efficient reaction development.

records.title: Divergence-Constrained Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Time-Domain Maxwell's Equations
records.tldr: We improve time-domain Maxwell PINNs by explicitly enforcing Gauss-law divergence constraints, yielding more accurate and faster-converging cavity simulations.

records.title: LeMat-GenBench: A Unified Evaluation Framework for Crystal Generative Models
records.tldr: LeMat-GenBench is a benchmarking framework that standardizes the evaluation of generative models for inorganic crystal structures, providing a reproducible and extensible foundation for fair model comparison.

records.title: AI-Enabled Development of Cooling Device for High-Power Electronics
records.tldr: This paper presents the objectives of the AI4Colling project (CNRS@CREATE and NTU) and hightlights the proposed methodology for designing and testing  composites of Phase-Change-Materials and  Heater Spreader topologies

records.title: Design Methodologies for Skyrmion-Based Circuits and Systems in AI-Driven Applications: Bi-Directional Integration
records.tldr: This work highlights the bidirectional synergy between AI and skyrmion-based systems, where AI models guide nanoscale magnetic dynamics, and skyrmion devices enable ultra-low-energy, scalable hardware for edge and in-memory intelligence.

records.title: Ultra-low-energy skyrmion-based learning automata element for adaptive edge intelligence
records.tldr: This paper introduces a physics-informed, skyrmion-based hardware primitive for learning automata, bridging nanomagnetism and interpretable machine learning to enable energy-efficient AI acceleration at the edge.

records.title: A Disorder-Aware Multi-fidelity Framework for Robust Prediction of Superconducting Critical Temperature
records.tldr: We propose a disorder-aware multi-fidelity graph framework using virtual nodes to robustly predict the critical temperature of superconductors.

records.title: Symmetry-Aware Deep Learning for Generalizable STEM Phase Classification
records.tldr: Symmetry helps classifiers to generalize to identify materials phases

records.title: The Economy of Reasoning: Incentivizing Epistemic Diversity in Decentralized Scientific Swarms
MultiTaskDeltaNet: Change Detection-based Image Segmentation for operando ETEM with Application to Carbon Gasification Kinetics
records.tldr: MultiTaskDeltaNet (MTDN) reframes semantic segmentation as change detection, enabling data-efficient, automated operando ETEM analysis for spatially-resolved carbon gasification kinetics with superior performance on small, ambiguous features.
keywords: computer vision; transmission electron microscopy; nanomaterials characterization; image segmentation; small data

records.title: A Multimodal Conditional JEPA for Composite Materials
records.tldr: A Multimodal Conditional JEPA for Composite Materials

records.title: ATLAS: accelerating materials discovery at Imperial College London
records.tldr: Presenting the ATLAS facility at Imperial College London, outlining its high-throughput automation capabilities for chemical synthesis and characterisation, and illustrating how these tools enable faster, more reproducible experimental workflows.

records.title: Beyond Statelessness: Engineering Subjective Cognition via Hierarchical Memory Consolidation and Tunable Agency
records.tldr: We introduce a cognitive architecture enabling agents to evolve from stateless executors into opinionated partners by consolidating episodic experiences into tunable subjective beliefs.

records.title: E-MAP –  A Self Driving Lab for Solution Based Combinatorial Semiconductor Discovery
records.tldr: We demonstrate deep learning for automated in-situ measurement of contact angles inside a spin coater and a novel technique for charge carrier mobility measurement in thin-film semiconductors

records.title: BigSolDB 2.0, dataset of solubility values for organic compounds in different solvents at various temperatures
records.tldr: BigSolDB 2.0 is a large-scale experimental solubility dataset across diverse solvents, designed for training, validating, and benchmarking AI models in chemistry.

records.title: Towards accelerating the discovery of efficient iridium(III) emitters using a novel database and machine learning based only on structural formulas
records.tldr: A new database of experimental optical properties of 1287 iridium(III) complexes was used for a simple and accurate prediction of efficient iridium emitters.

records.title: Printing kinetic data and microkinetic models in an automated lab
records.tldr: Automatic generation, discrimination, and fitting of quantitative microkinetic models utilizing an automated lab for real time continuous data collection.

records.title: Autonomous nanoparticle synthesis by design
Global Plane Waves From Local Gaussians: Periodic Charge Densities in a Blink
records.tldr: ultra-fast charge density prediction in periodic systems

records.title: Securing Autonomous Chemical Robots Through Physical and Digital Containment
records.tldr: The CoSHHputer integrates blast-tested physical containment, encrypted digital protocols, and mixed-reality simulations into a secure autonomous platform that enables the safe execution of hazardous reactions without human exposure.

records.title: Accelerating materials innovation through automated theoretical-experimental iterations empowered by AI-Chemist
A Comparative Study of Molecular Dynamics Approaches for Simulating Ionic Conductivity in Solid Lithium Electrolytes.
An Accurate Deep Learning Force Field for Dielectric and Ferroelectric $Hf_{x}Zr_{1-x}O_2$ Solid Solutions
MOOSE-Chem2: Exploring LLM Limits in Fine-Grained Scientific Hypothesis Discovery via Hierarchical Search
The Cognitive Clinical OS: Architecting Asynchronous Agentic Reasoning for Real-Time Decision Support
records.tldr: A real-time hyperaware clinical AI architecture that perceives and acts during clinical workflows like patient encounters to trigger evidence-based interventions with zero latency or conduct agentic follow-throughs.

records.title: A Field-Deployable IoT-Edge-AI Framework for Landslide Prediction and Early Warning
records.tldr: This paper presents an IoT-Edge AI architecture that can be deployed in a real landslide location. This architecture is capable of predicting landslides and generate early warning in advance.

records.title: A Data-driven Closed-looped High-throughput Platform for Thermocatalyst Discovery
records.tldr: We present a data-driven, closed-loop high-throughput platform that algorithmically guides exploration of alloy catalyst spaces, enabling faster and more atom-efficient discovery of effective thermocatalysts for formic acid dehydrogenation.
keywords: high throughput experimentation; catalysis; formic acid decomposition; closed looped; self driven lab

records.title: High-throughput ML Screening of Doped Cathode Active Materials
Deciphering the operando mechanism of Haber-Bosch process
keywords: catalytic surface reaction; realistic conditions; AI; Haber-Bosch process

records.title: Order-chaos transition in deep neural network and its application to the training process
records.tldr: This paper explores the transition between order and chaos in deep neural networks, using Lyapunov exponents as a tool to optimize LSTM training near the edge of chaos and improve LSTM's performance.

records.title: Code and Data are not all you need for reproducibility
A Standard Physical Environment for Benchmarking AI-driven Cell Biology
records.tldr: This work proposes a standardized yet generalizable physical setup to evaluate AI agents on cell culture protocol optimization.

records.title: Post-PCI Cardiac Death Prediction via Synthetic Minority Augmentation and Stress-Tested Probability Quality
records.tldr: We improve post-PCI cardiac mortality prediction by using synthetic minority augmentation and edge-case stress tests to boost rare-event detection and produce more clinically reliable risk probabilities.

records.title: Ethical Nail Salons: A community-governed and SDL-facilitated approach to mitigate occupational chemical hazards in nail salons
records.tldr: Using SDL capabilities, such as the Robotic Autonomous Imaging Surface Evaluator (RAISE), we aim to create a nail technician–governed model for safe and functional nail polish.

records.title: An End-to-end, Autonomous Platform for Liquid-liquid Extraction Optimization
records.tldr: We've developed  self-driving lab that leverages plug-and-play hardware, computer vision, and real-time analytics to evaluate and otpimizie liquid-liquid extraction conditions

records.title: Electrochemical Feedback for Closed-Loop Facet Control in Pd Nanoparticles
records.tldr: This work introduces an underpotential deposition-enabled, closed-loop self-driving platform for rapid, facet determining electrochemical characterization to optimize nanomaterial electrocatalysts.

records.title: Nanostructured Material Design via a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Approach: Bridging Laboratory Practice and Scientific Literature
records.tldr: This study proposes a RAG system integrated with LLM to automate development of surface nano structuring to guide cell cultures on a surface

records.title: On-the-fly reaction monitoring using correlated spectroscopies
Spectral Analysis of the Weighted Frobenius Objective
Crystalline phase projection and identification from high temperature diffractograms using graph neural networks
records.tldr: A Graph Neural Network for crystalline phase identification

records.title: Discovery of Sustainable Refrigerants through Physics-Informed RL Fine-Tuning of Sequence Models
Impact of explicit long-range interactions on the accuracy of machine learning interatomic potentials in modeling molecular liquids
records.tldr: We systematically evaluate when explicit electrostatic and dispersion interactions are necessary to improve the accuracy of machine-learning interatomic potentials for molecular liquids.

records.title: Automated High Throughput Optimization for Halide Perovskite Memristors
records.tldr: This work combines automated high-throughput experimentation with ML-guided optimization to optimize 2D perovskite memristors for neuromorphic computing.

records.title: Data-driven discovery of novel materials for smart optoelectronics
AI-guided experimental design of zirconium MOPs with The World Avatar for sustainable photocatalysis
Generative Symmetry in Crystal Modelling
records.tldr: We propose a generative model that learns crystal symmetry via symmetry operations, letting space groups emerge naturally and enabling structure exploration via group-subgroup relations for materials discovery.

records.title: DIGIBAT: Bridging the gap between physical automation and AI in energy research
records.tldr: DIGIBAT accelerates energy materials discovery by integrating robotics and digital twin infrastructure to transform manual experiments into scalable, AI-ready workflows
keywords: Automated Energy Research; AI-Driven Discovery; High-Throughput Experimentation; Laboratory Automation

records.title: Multi-task Attention for Doped Thermoelectric Properties Prediction
records.tldr: We improved the prediction of doped thermoelectric material properties by introducing multi-task learning and attention.

records.title: MCP-Enabled LLM Agents for Closed-Loop Optimization in Real-Time Physical Experiments
records.tldr: We built an MCP-based multi-agent lab platform where LLMs run real experiments in closed loop; across physical benchmarks, LLM-driven optimization outperforms Bayesian optimization, and we extend the workflow to electrochemistry optimization.

records.title: A Multi-Modal Deep Learning Platform for Cross-Domain Property Prediction in Chemical Process Design
records.tldr: We present a platform for predicting chemical process properties using a universal hierarchical tree representation that transfers across domains with minimal fine-tuning data.

records.title: CatMaster: An Agentic Autonomous System for Computational Heterogeneous Catalysis Research
records.tldr: CatMaster presents a project-level agentic system for computational heterogeneous catalysis that turns a natural-language intent into an end-to-end tool simulation workflows with closed-loop execution and analysis ability.

records.title: Exploration of Ternary Thin-Film Lithium Solid Electrolyte Composites  Using the Digital Laboratory for Enhanced Lithium-Ion Conductivity
records.tldr: Automated and Autonomous Discovery of High Lithium-Ion Conductors via Digital Laboratory

records.title: Learning to Image in Slepian-Pollack Basis – Achieving Super-resolution of Nanostructures
Adaptive Human-in-the-Loop Optimization Using Language-Guided Priors for Chemical Synthesis
records.tldr: We accelerate autonomous chemical discovery by using LLMs to translate expert language into optimization priors, while employing a safety guard  mechanism that automatically disables the prior if the data proves the expert wrong.

records.title: Physics-informed Deep Operator Networks for Real-Time Spatiotemporal Monitoring of Indoor Air Quality
records.tldr: We propose a hybrid PI-DeepONet framework that integrates governing physical laws with real-time sensor fusion to achieve accurate, physically consistent 3D reconstruction of indoor air quality from sparse data.

records.title: A shortcut towards simulating millions of atoms using machine learning potentials
records.tldr: Threebody interactions is essential for machine learning potentials, but redundant during inference, hence enabling scalable molecular dynamics without retraining or architectural modification.

records.title: Importance of Electronic Entropy for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
records.tldr: We investigate the impact of electronic entropy (defined here as the spatial distribution of Fe2+/Fe3+ redox pairs) on MLIP performance using olivine-type NaFePO4 as a model system.

records.title: A Three-Level Feature Selection Framework for Android Malware Detection
records.tldr: We propose a three-level feature selection framework using Gradient Boosting, Recursive Feature Elimination, and a Voting Classifier to reduce redundancy and improve Android malware detection accuracy, latency, and false alarms.

records.title: Automation of the Polishing-Etching Process in Metallographic Observation
records.tldr: We are developing a device to automate metallographic polishing and etching.

records.title: Evolving collaborative research ideas with multi-agent grounding in lab-specific contexts and literature
records.tldr: We introduce a multi-agent evolution loop that grounds multi-lab collaboration ideas in lab-specific context and literature, improving the LLM-judged pairwise win rate to 77.8% vs. initial ideas.

records.title: Atomic Sudoku: Stochastic approaches for correlated disorder materials
records.tldr: Correlated disorder makes first principle calculations of many materials difficult. We explore a potential workaround to this problem that is also generally applicable.

records.title: Self-Driving Labs for Nanomaterials Development for Energy Applications: Syn-thesis, Dispersion, and Composite Forming
records.tldr: We developed self-driving laboratories for nanomaterials development and will present our findings, including machine-learning analyses of datasets acquired through chemical vapor deposition (CVD) and related processes.

records.title: Atomic-Level Interpretable Multimodal Graph Neural Network for Predicting Carbon Capture in Metal-Organic Frameworks
keywords: multimodal MOF adsorption graph neural network

records.title: End-to-end neural reconstruction of DNA structures from single-frame fluorescence images
records.tldr: We propose a deep learning model to reconstruct physically consistent DNA coordinates from single-frame noisy fluorescence microscopy images

records.title: A Universal Autonomous Agent for Atomistic Simulation and Benchmarking Its Capabilities
records.tldr: QUASAR is an open-source autonomous agent system that uses large language models to plan, execute, and self-correct complex atomistic simulations across multiple scales—from quantum calculations to molecular dynamics—without human intervention.

records.title: Bridging LLM-based planning and workflow languages for automated, validated, scalable exploration of scRNA-seq analyses
records.tldr: We present an automated scRNA-seq analysis framework that bridges LLM-based planning with validated workflow execution, enabling scalable and reliable exploration of diverse analysis strategies.

records.title: Automation of thermal ageing and tensile tests for adhesively bonded single lap joints
records.tldr: An automated system was developed to evaluate the durability of structural adhesive joints that demand high long‑term performance.

records.title: CSX Framework for Synthesis-Oriented Generative Materials Discovery
records.tldr: We introduce the CSX framework, a synthesis-oriented generative materials discovery paradigm that maps precursor-constrained chemical systems in energy–property space to identify experimentally accessible regions with targeted properties.

records.title: Closed Loop Inorganic Material Discovery with Design-Test-Make-Analyze Paradigm
records.tldr: ML model predicted ZnVO3; pathways of synthesis were generate; a ultrafast synthesis captured it; and a comprehensive charaterization (in-XRD+TEM+TGA) confirmed the success

records.title: Automation and AI-Powered Prediction in Chromatographic Separation
Large Language Models in Materials Science: Assessing RAG Evaluation Frameworks through graphene synthesis
From Global to Local: AI-based Climate Downscaling for Southeast Asia
Development of a benchtop self-driving laboratory for electrocatalyst deposition and evaluation
When is Bayesian Optimization Beneficial? A Critical Assessment of Optimization Strategies in High-Throughput Organic Photovoltaic Manufacturing
records.tldr: Environmental control trumps AI optimization in solar cell manufacturing, challenging conventional wisdom about how to improve production efficiency.

records.title: A systematic effort toward establishing an automatic end-to-end synthesis workflow for small molecules
records.tldr: This work presents a systematic effort toward establishing an end-to-end workflow for small-molecule synthesis through the coordinated development of automation hardware and AI-driven software frameworks.

records.title: Democratizing Discovery: Ultra-Low-Cost Self-Driving Laboratories for Materials Science
records.tldr: We demonstrate ultra-low-cost self-driving labs using commodity hardware and open-source software, cutting autonomous experimentation costs by 10× while maintaining research-grade performance.

records.title: A Unified Diffusion Framework for the End-to-End Generation of Symmetry-Constrained Complex Molecular Crystals
Machine learning analysis of literature dataset on the CO2 reduction toward prediction of high activity multi-elemental catalysts
records.tldr: We developed machine-learning models trained on literature data to predict multi-element catalyst performance for CO₂ reduction.

records.title: Toward Generalizable, Data-Efficient Self-Driving Laboratories for Organic Materials
AutoMEA - an automated electrolyser device for self-driving labs
records.tldr: The paper introduces AutoMEA, an automated membrane electrode assembly with integrated sensors for high throughput and intelligent experimentation in self-driving labs.

records.title: Autonomous Workflows and SHAP Interpretation of Deposition-Rates in Bipolar HiPIMS
records.tldr: Our proposed workflow combines autonomous experimentation and interpretable machine learning and is broadly applicable to the discovery and optimization of complex plasma processes.

records.title: Using Time-Series Forecasting to Accelerate Materials Stability Assessments
records.tldr: In our group, we study material degradation by integrating combinatorial materials testing with time-series forecasting models.

records.title: Self-Driven Process Optimization in Pneumatic 3D Printing: From Static Ensemble Learning to Autonomous Bayesian Method
records.tldr: We present an open-source pneumatic printer that uses Bayesian optimization to autonomously self-tune processing parameters for materials ranging from liquid solutions to viscous melts.

records.title: Agentic AI–Enabled Integration of a Hybrid System of Predictive Models for Accelerated Direct‑Compression Drug Product Development
records.tldr: We built an agentic‑AI–driven hybrid modelling system that autonomously links mechanistic and ML models to accelerate and de‑risk directly‑compressed tablet development.

records.title: Affordable 3D Printed Automation for Self-Driving Laboratory: Expanding Access to High-Throughput Experimentation
Learning Nonlinear Dissolution Trajectories in Binary Polymer–Solvent Systems
records.tldr: We learn an ordered solvation coordinate that reveals asymmetric, cooperative, and competitive polymer dissolution in binary solvents as nonlinear trajectories, without assuming additive mixing rules.

records.title: Deep Learning of Accurate Force Field of Hf$_x$Si$_{1-x}$O$_2$
records.tldr: We develop a machine learning potential for ferroelectric HfₓSi₁₋ₓO₂, enabling high-accuracy atomistic simulations of its phase transitions and polarization dynamics

records.title: Meta Bayesian Optimization to Discover a Problem Worth Optimizing
Towards Critical Branching Mechanism in Recurrent Neural Networks
records.tldr: This abstract proposes a framework to investigate the critical branching mechanism in LSTMs in analogy to neuronal avalanches in biological brain systems.

records.title: Diffusion-Driven Generation of Novel Crystalline Materials with Target Optical Properties
records.tldr: Diffusion-based generation of crystalline materials with target optical properties enables discovery of transparent, highly birefringent compounds such as CaMoN₂ beyond existing materials repositories.

records.title: Robotic-arm-based self-driving laboratories powered by NIMO and IvoryOS
records.tldr: We integrated NIMO and IvoryOS to provide an accessible software framework for self-driving laboratories, and demonstrated it using robotic-arm-based systems.

records.title: Space-Group Identification from Multi-Phase Powder XRD via Latent Phase Modeling
records.tldr: We propose a latent phase decomposition framework for multi-label space-group prediction from multi-phase powder XRD, enabling chemistry-agnostic symmetry inference even in the presence of unknown phases.

records.title: MaiML: A Common Data Format for Measurement and Analysis and Its Application to an Autonomous Experimental System
records.tldr: MaiML is a standardized, XML‑based data format that unifies measurement, analysis, and workflow information to enable interoperable, AI‑driven autonomous experiments and digital laboratories.

records.title: Constrained composite Bayesian optimisation for rational synthesis of polymeric particles
records.tldr: This work extends Bayesian optimisation to target-value optimisation with a priori unknown feasibility awareness, making it suitable for practical materials synthesis tasks.
keywords: Self-Driving Labs; Materials Science; Chemistry; Active Learning; Bayesian Optimisation

records.title: Multi-objective optimization for designing structurally similar proteins with dissimilar sequences
records.tldr: We integrate ProteinMPNN with NSGA-II for protein design, optimizing structural similarity and sequence similarity. Using Top7 as reference, our method yields proteins with lower sequence similarity while preserving structural accuracy.

records.title: Unveiling Process–Structure–Property Coupling in CNT Fibers via Multimodal AI Analytics
records.tldr: Using AI-assisted analysis, independent contributions in the multidimensional structure–property relationships of carbon nanotube fibers were identified, providing insights for mechanistic interpretation.

records.title: Autonomous Discovery of High-performance Ni–Mo Electrocatalysts for Green Hydrogen Production
records.tldr: Integrating machine learning with automated experimentation enables fast discovery of high-performing green hydrogen electrocatalysts

records.title: Integrating Multimodal Knowledge Mining and Autonomous Experimentation for  Accelerated Electrosynthesis Discovery
records.tldr: Automated electrochemistry platform

records.title: Toward a Global SAR Foundation Model for SAR-to-Spectral-Indices Mapping
records.tldr: We develop a global SAR foundation model using masked autoencoding on Sentinel-1 data and demonstrate its transferability for cross-modal SAR-to-optical spectral indices mapping.

records.title: $2k_F$ instability and chiral spin density wave at the 1/9 magnetization plateau in the kagome antiferromagnets
aLLoyM: A Large Language Model for Alloy Phase Diagram Prediction
Identification of MOFs with Unique Pore Shapes Using Computer Vision
Eliminating Cryogenic Constraints in Ipsenol Synthesis through Real-Time Reaction Landscape Mapping
records.tldr: Data driven analysis of temperature controlled synthesis in flow

records.title: Selective and Sustainable Oxidation of Allyl Alcohol in Water Using a TS-1 Catalyst in Continuous Flow: A Machine-Learning-Driven Approach
records.tldr: We combined a new catalyst, an automated flow reactor, and machine learning to efficiently make a valuable chemical using only water, achieving faster reactions, better control, and a more sustainable process than traditional methods

records.title: Dynamic Parameter Scanning: a Novel Method for Mechanistic Elucidation
records.tldr: Dynamic Parameter Scanning is a global a parallelized approach for mechanistic elucidation providing unique data sets and more robust model fitting.

records.title: Add, Mix, Heat, Filter - Repeat, Repeat, Repeat
records.tldr: Our platform is designed for automated synthesis and characterisation of solid state materials, as part of a France-wide initiative.

records.title: Development of an automated system for ceramic powder process
