records.tldr: We have automated the powder raw material dispensing, weighing and grinding, mixing process in the powder raw material sample syn-thesis process by using robot arms.

records.title: Machine learning for in-situ composition mapping in a self-driving magnetron sputtering system
records.tldr: This work advances an SDL based on magnetron co-sputtering. We present a fast, calibration-free, in-situ ML approach to predict the deposition rate using quartz-crystal microbalance sensors.

records.title: AI & Culture Alignment: Interpretation over Measurement
records.tldr: This paper reframes cultural alignment in AI as a user-situated, interpretive achievement and proposes a qualitative, human-centred evaluation approach for governance and deployment contexts.

records.title: IvoryOS: An Interoperable Platform and Community for Self-Driving Laboratories
records.tldr: IvoryOS is an open-source orchestration layer that turns scientific code into executable, visual workflows for automated and self-driving laboratories.

records.title: Scalable learning of macroscopic stochastic dynamics
Identifiable learning of dissipative dynamics
Flow Chemistry as a Platform for Experimental Multi-objective Optimization of Heterogeneous Polymer Synthesis
records.tldr: This work exemplifies two important self-driving laboratory platforms designed for polymer synthesis using flow chemistry underpinned by advanced online monitoring and self-optimization algorithms.
keywords: Polymers; nanoparticles; flow chemistry; self-driving labs; multi-objective optimization

records.title: Materials informatics framework for accelerated discovery of high-refractive-index 2D materials
records.tldr: This work presents a physics-guided machine-learning framework that integrates DFT, graph neural networks and experimental validation to enable rapid screening of high-refractive-index 2D materials for near-IR photonic applications.

records.title: LapidaryEngine: Feedback-Guided Iterative Text-to-Crystal Structure Generation
records.tldr: Propose conversational text-to-crystal generation rather than one-shot generation.

records.title: Edge-AI Driven Automation for Scalable E-Waste Recycling
records.tldr: A low-cost, computer-vision based robotic system that autonomously detects and removes screws from  laptops to enable scalable, automated e-waste disassembly.

records.title: AI for Plasma Diagnostics in Laboratory Astrophysics: Reconstructing Invisible Fields from Proton Images
records.tldr: A robust deep learning method for reconstructing magnetic fields from proton radiography, designed to handle the spectral uncertainties of real-world experimental sources.

records.title: Symmetry‐Aware Equivariant Network for Discovering SHG‐Active Materials
records.tldr: First known neural network for full second harmonic generation tensor prediction, state-of-the-art approach.

records.title: AI-Enhanced Zero Noise Extrapolation using Residual Neural Networks for Quantum Error Mitigation
records.tldr: We replace traditional polynomial extrapolation in ZNE with a Residual Neural Network that learns noise-scaling functions, recovering up to 92.1% of signal lost to quantum gate errors.

records.title: Translating Natural Language Processing Frameworks in Humanistic Data Analysis
NIMO: Universal Middleware for Closed-Loop Materials Exploration
records.tldr: NIMO is an open-source middleware that enables seamless, modular integration of ML and robotic hardware to rapidly build self-driving laboratories for materials science.

records.title: Improving the univariate calibration approach with Bayesian modeling for IR reaction monitoring
records.tldr: Using bayesian modelling to improve univariate calibration for IR reaction monitoring

records.title: A Modular and Interpretable Pipeline for Unsupervised Learning on Scientific Spatiotemporal Imaging Datasets
records.tldr: We describe an unsupervised learning pipeline architecture for spatiotemporal data with modularity and interpretability in mind for many potential applications.

records.title: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework with Hierarchical Citation Graph for Automated Survey Generation
records.tldr: SurveyG uses a hierarchical citation graph to enable LLMs to generate more coherent, comprehensive, and well-structured survey papers than prior methods.

records.title: Accelerating Nanocarbon Dispersion Research via Machine Learning and Automated Experimentation
records.tldr: Utilizing AI and automated experiments to accelerate nanocarbon dispersion development

records.title: Data-scarce synthesis-by-design of ferroelectric Dion–Jacobson 2D hybrid organic–inorganic perovskites
records.tldr: A synthesis-by-design workflow combining interpretable symbolic regression and MLIP phase-formability screening enables actionable spacer selection and delivers a new ferroelectric DJ perovskite, (s-FBDA)PbI4.

records.title: AI-driven computational workflows for scalable innovative materials design
keywords: AI-driven multiscale workflow with active/LLM automation

records.title: Local-Global Associative Frames for Symmetry-Preserving Crystal Structure Modeling
A machine learning workflow to accelerate the design of in vitro release tests from liposomes
records.tldr: A machine learning workflow was developed to predict liposome drug release profiles, enabling accelerated design of in vitro release tests.

records.title: Spatial Machine-Learning Prediction of Lung Function and Body Mass Index in Australian Cystic Fibrosis Patients
records.tldr: Spatial determinants of Cystic Fibrosis Outcomes

records.title: Instructing a Chatbot to Design Nucleic Acid Probes for Diagnostics
Graph learning metallic glass discovery  from Wikipedia
records.tldr: A research article published in "AI for Science" to study how to design metallic materials by graph neural network from material networks encoded by a language model from Wikipedia
